title: Woman, 19, killed in Essex dog attack named as Jamie-Lea Biscoe
description: Police arrest man, 37, on suspicion of being in charge of dog dangerously out of control and causing injury resulting in death
content:
A 19-year-old woman who died after a dog attack in Essex has been named by police as Jamie-Lea Biscoe.
Police said the victim was found with serious injuries after emergency services were called to a property in Leaden Roding at 10.45pm on Friday. Bi... [1869 chars]

title: Easyjet passengers stranded in Milan by border check queues
description: About 100 people missed their flights because of border control queues at Milan's Linate airport.
content:
About 100 people have been left stranded in Milan after a flight to Manchester left without them.
They were due to depart on an Easyjet flight on Sunday but faced queues of up to three hours at Milan's Linate airport because of new border control che... [3884 chars]

title: Richard Tice tax row is 'minor administrative error', party claims
description: A property company owned by the Reform UK deputy leader failed to pay £91,000 in tax on dividends, according to the Sunday Times.
content:
A row over tax paid by Reform UK deputy leader Richard Tice's property company was "a minor administrative error", his party has claimed.
The company, which Tice founded and owned, failed to pay £91,000 in tax before dividends were paid to him and hi... [1887 chars]

title: Man Utd are set up to be big winners from the Premier League weekend without even playing yet
description: United are set up to be among the real winners in the Premier League this weekend - unless there is an unwelcome sting in the tail.
content:

title: Bottle job? Man City fan celebrates with Arsenal taunt as Chelsea rout narrows title gap
description: Manchester City are closing in on Arsenal in a gripping Premier League title race -- and their fans know it.
content:
